feedback_text: The staff were incredibly rude and unhelpful when I tried to resolve my billing issue. I have been a loyal customer for years and this is unacceptable treatment.
My package has not arrived after two weeks. The tracking shows it was dispatched but the courier says they cannot find it. This is a complete disaster for my business.
The product quality has severely declined. I received a defective item that stopped working after one day. I need an immediate refund and replacement.
I have been waiting for a refund for three weeks now. Every time I contact support they give me a different answer. This billing issue is making me consider leaving.
Delivery was delayed by five days with no notification. I had to contact support multiple times to get an update. Please improve your communication.
Overall a decent experience. The product worked as expected. Delivery was on time. I would appreciate if there were more product variety options available.
The item I received was completely wrong. I ordered a blue model and received red. When I asked for a replacement the support team was slow to respond.
This is the third time I am raising a complaint about delayed shipments. The delivery team clearly has a systemic problem that is not being addressed.
Great experience overall! The product was exactly as described and arrived ahead of schedule. Customer service was friendly and helpful. Highly recommend.
The product quality was acceptable but the packaging was damaged on arrival. Luckily the item itself was fine. Please improve your packaging standards.
I have been overcharged twice this month. The billing team keeps saying they will investigate but nothing has changed. I want my money back immediately.
Good value for money. The product does what it says. Delivery was a bit slow but the quality makes up for it. Will buy again.
The item listed as in stock was actually out of stock after I placed my order. I was not informed until I followed up three days later. Very poor availability management.
Service at the customer support center was average. The staff member was polite but unable to resolve my issue on the first call. Had to call back twice.
Extremely disappointed. The product is clearly counterfeit and nothing like what was advertised. I want a full refund and will be reporting this.
Really happy with my purchase. Everything arrived on time and the product quality is excellent. The loyalty rewards program is a great touch.
Package went missing and nobody can tell me where it is. I have called support four times and each person gives me different information. This is completely unacceptable.
The refund was processed but took longer than expected. Communication could be improved but the outcome was satisfactory. Average experience overall.
I have raised this delivery complaint before and the issue still persists. Repeated delays are damaging my trust in your service. Escalation is needed.
Absolutely love the product! Arrived quickly and is exactly what I needed. The packaging was beautiful too. Definitely buying again and recommending to friends.
The staff attitude during my visit was completely unprofessional. I was ignored for twenty minutes and then spoken to rudely. I expect better from a premium service.
The product was out of stock when I tried to reorder. I wish there was a notification system so I could be alerted when items are back. Otherwise fine.
Defective product received. The screen stopped working after three days. I have submitted a warranty claim but have not received any response in two weeks.
Three consecutive delayed deliveries have cost me business. I need this resolved immediately and compensation for the disruption caused by your unreliable delivery service.
The product is good and the price is fair. Delivery was on time. Support team was responsive when I had a question. Generally a positive experience.
